jsonLd.title: Wrogn is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!
